subtitle: Senior AI Strategy & Governance Leader -- AI Architecture Evaluation | Production ML Governance | Advisory & Operating Depth
summary_text: Senior technology and AI-strategy leader with two complementary credentials. First: 17 years as founder of DMLCo, a web/IT consulting firm with full P&L (peak $4-5M revenue, 12 employees, dozens of client engagements) -- advisory firm operating depth at professional-services margins. Second: 14 years as the first CTO at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB across all 50 states) -- where I owned the data function end-to-end including production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms across NICE / Genesys-tier solutions and AI-focused startups, with explicit treatment of governance, integration fit, vendor lock-in, and failure modes at scale.

Provide client-facing AI advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions in a regulated environment with model governance under audit conditions.

Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent call routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live; build-buy-partner architecture across enterprise CC and specialized AI vendors.

Owned buyer-side vendor governance across the full vendor lifecycle: SoW authorship, vendor budget and burn-rate tracking, multi-year vendor relationship management, and resource-leveling decisions across in-house, nearshore, and offshore teams.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization.
Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.

Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership -- $4-5M peak revenue, 12 employees at peak, end-to-end responsibility for finance, client delivery, talent, and operations.

Built and sustained long-term client advisory relationships across dozens of accounts; grew primarily through referral, demonstrating executive trust-building and delivery reliability at professional-services margins.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go).

skills.items: AI Architecture Evaluation, AI Governance, AI/ML Guardrails, Generative AI, Agentic AI, LLM Platforms
DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Governance, Power BI, Tableau, Cross-Functional Data Definitions
P&L Ownership, Client Advisory, Engagement Management, SoW Authorship, Vendor Budget Management, Buyer-Side Governance
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Build-Buy-Partner
